content.full_text:
John B. Jackson
Certified Public Accountant
1955 Bonifacio Street
Concord, California 94520
(415) 689-1360

February 6, 1990

California Political Practice Commission
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA  95804-0807

Dear Sir:

I am a concern citizen who has heard that a few people are using
an entity with a tax exempt status for their own business and tax
advantage, while attempting to influence legislation.

A local non-profit organization, called People Over Plane, has
over the last year been a active opponent to the Concord Buchanan
Field Master Plan, and the extension of Dimond Boulevard thru the
local golf course from one side of the airport to the other.

I have been informed and believe that People Over Planes is being
financed by two individuals; Leon Gore and Dave Strickland, who
have proposed to lease the Buchanan Air Field Golf Course.  It
would appear that these two individuals have formed a tax exempt
entity to influence legislation in order to renegotiate the lease
of Buchanan Field for themselves as lessees.

It appears that almost all the funds for People Over Planes is
coming from these two individuals who have a direct economic
interest in keeping the airport master plan at bay and stopping
the development of the road through the golf course.

The reason for this letter is.

    1.  Is it legal to use tax exempt entity for business
        motives of this type?

    2.  Is it legal to take as a contribution deduction, contri-
        butions made to an entity of this type?

    3.  Is this a lobbyist organization which has strict reporting
        requirements?

I would appreciate your response.

Sincerely,

John B. Jackson
John B. Jackson
Certified Public Accountant

LIST OF ADVOCATES:

1 PEOPLES OVER PLANES
  PO BOX 2376
  PLEASANT HILL CA 94523
  PRESIDENT: STACEY WYSS
  415-689-3562

2 LEON GORE
  931 REDWOOD DR.
  DANVILLE CA 94526

3 DAVE STRICKLAND
  ORINDA CA.

PEOPLE OVER PLANES, INC., is a public benefit non-profit corporation. Donations to the corporation are tax deductible under Section 170 of the Internal Revenue Code. Translated, this means we are a public information group and we rely solely on donations.

The goals of People Over Planes are:
1) To improve flight safety and noise abatement procedures at Buchanan Field.
2) To keep citizens informed of proposed changes at the airport and encourage citizen involvement
3) To preserve our quality of life by preventing additional scheduled commercial airline service at Buchanan Field.

[AIRCRAFT COMPLAINT NUMBERS box:]
Buchanan Field: 646-5722
Pleasant Hill Hotline: 944-3229
FAA Safety Hotline: 800-255-1111

This newsletter will be published at irregular intervals but as frequently as new information requires.

[PEOPLE OVER PLANES, INC. logo with aircraft illustration]

PO Box 2336
Pleasant Hill, CA 94523

[NON PROFIT ORGANIZATION U.S.POSTAGE PAID Permit #523 Concord, CA]

Resident
195 Popular Dr.
Martinez, CA 94553

POP
PEOPLE OVER PLANES, INC.

September 18, 1989


Dear Airport Neighbor:

The County is frantically pushing ahead with its plans to make
Buchanan Field a major regional airport.

If something isn't done, we are facing a 20-million-dollar airport
expansion plan with all the danger, pollution, noise and loss of property
values that go along with it. We are not satisfied with the County's efforts
at appeasing us with feeble comforting statements and self-justifications.

We need to protect ourselves and our property. County officials
will not do it. We at People Over Planes have retained Clem Shute and
his pre-eminent environmental law firm, Shute, Mihaly & Weinberger.
This will give us someone in our corner. This is the same firm that sued
on behalf of Orange County residents leading to a settlement limiting
expansion of commercial flights at John Wayne Airport for 20 years.

P.O.P. needs your financial support to sustain our legal challenge to
the threats to our safety and property values. Please be as generous as you
can with your contribution.

A return envelope is enclosed.

Very truly yours,

Stacy Wyss
President

Enc.


P.O. Box 2336 • Pleasant Hill, CA 94523 • (415) 689-5652

WANT TO HELP

[illegible]

Name:

Address:

City, Zip:

Phone:

[illegible] pass on literature
[illegible] with telephoning.
I can help by
[illegible] an installing list
[illegible] call we about meetings
or my contributions
My contribution is enclosed

Please send us an envelope
and mail to

People Over Planes, Inc.
P. O. Box 2336
Pleasant Hill, CA 94523

[illegible] is a tax deductible
non-profit and tax-exempts
write to us at the address above
or phone (415) 689-5652

P.O.P'S OFFICERS

PRESIDENT, STACY WYSS

VICE-PRESIDENT, SUNNY BRADSHAW

SECRETARY, TANYA LEYDEN

TREASURER, NOBI BRUCE

BOARD OF DIRECTORS

ROBERT BRUCE

JOYCE CHURCH

MAC MACE

STANLEY A. MILLER

DON MOUNT

PATRICIA MYHILL

BOB VIACAVA

[POP LOGO]

PEOPLE OVER PLANES, INC.

P. O. BOX 2336
PLEASANT HILL, CA 94523
(415) 689-5652

WHEN YOU BOUGHT
YOUR HOME,

IS THIS WHAT
YOU HAD IN MIND
FOR SCENERY?

[POP LOGO]
PEOPLE OVER PLANES, INC.

POP
PEOPLE OVER PLANES, INC.

WHAT IS P.O.P.?

People Over Planes, Inc., is a public-benefit, non-profit corporation whose goals are to:

• Improve flight safety and noise abatement at Buchanan Field;

• Inform citizens of proposed changes at the airport;

• Encourage citizen involvement in County decisions concerning the Airport; and

• Preserve our quality of life by preventing further scheduled commercial airline and commuter service at Buchanan Field.

WHAT DO WE DO?

• Research - P.O.P.'s staff researches technical and legal documents about aviation and Contra Costa County airports.

• Listen - we gather information from our airport neighbors, County officials and committees, and groups similar to ours throughout the Country.

• Speak - we present your views to the Board of Supervisors, City and County agencies, civic groups, pilot groups, and environmental groups. We inform the public of our findings through P.O.P.-organized public meetings and our newsletter.

• Represent the Public Conscience - our appearances before County and City agencies let them know what you think of their efforts and plans.

• Network - P.O.P. is in contact with other citizen groups throughout the Country. Airport neighbors everywhere in the U.S.A. have similar concerns, and we value other groups' input and cooperation.

WHAT CAN YOU DO?

To be effective, People Over Planes needs the support, efforts, and opinions of as many citizens as possible.

Our strengths are on numbers and the dedication of our people. The more committed people we have, the stronger we can block the County's plan to make Buchanan a "reliever airport" and the greater impact we will have on those who think the County's plan is acceptable, in terms of economic, school and neighborhood deterioration effects on health and environment, and lowering property values and established residential uses near the airport.

We need your help and support. If you share our concerns about increasing aircraft problems and damaging effects on all of us, join with us.

Use the response form attached.

*PRINTED ON RECYCLED PAPER
